query:
-- Fix projects: add missing columns
ALTER TABLE projects
  ADD COLUMN `driveId` varchar(128) AFTER `code`,
  ADD COLUMN `drivePath` text AFTER `driveId`,
  ADD COLUMN `estimatedHours` decimal(8,2) AFTER `managerId`,
  ADD COLUMN `color` varchar(16) DEFAULT '#FFCB09' AFTER `estimatedHours`;

-- Copy data from old columns to new ones
UPDATE projects SET 
  `driveId` = `googleDriveFolderId`,
  `drivePath` = `googleDriveFolderUrl`,
  `estimatedHours` = `budgetHours`;

-- Fix status enum to match schema (add 'intern' value)
ALTER TABLE projects 
  MODIFY COLUMN `status` enum('activ','suspendat','finalizat','intern') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'activ';

-- Drop old columns
ALTER TABLE projects
  DROP COLUMN `type`,
  DROP COLUMN `googleDriveFolderId`,
  DROP COLUMN `googleDriveFolderUrl`,
  DROP COLUMN `budgetHours`,
  DROP COLUMN `isBillable`;
